/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libdata.so -o ../lib/libdata.so CMakeFiles/data.dir/head/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data.dir/head/Eventloop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data.dir/head/InetAddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data.dir/head/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data.dir/head/epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data.dir/head/s_tcp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data.dir/head/thread_pool.cpp.o
